svg.text: `get_transcript` returns timestamped text. `understand_media` returns the same spoken content in a single-file summary flow.
[0.0–1.2] Host: Welcome back to the show.
[1.2–3.6] Guest: Today we are walking through how an LLM can inspect media without native video support.
[3.6–6.1] Host: We turn the file into text plus timestamped images so the model can reason over both.
[6.1–8.4] Guest: If the budget is tight, narrow the window or ask for fewer images.
max_total_chars keeps responses sane for LLMs.
